rationale: Novel coalgebraic compression for TLA+ recognized; needs depth in formal proofs, soundness guarantees, and evaluation rigor.

key_improvements.title: Formal T-Fair Coherence Theorem with Proof
key_improvements.addresses_critique: T-Fair coherence condition — the system's primary theoretical novelty — lacks a formal statement and proof
key_improvements.current_state: tfair_coherence.py has a runtime checker but no formal mathematical statement or proof. The checker verifies the condition algorithmically but the theorem itself is not stated with hypotheses and conclusion.
planned_changes: Add formal_proofs/ module with LaTeX-grade theorem statements in Python docstrings
Implement constructive proof witnesses: for each acceptance pair, produce a certificate that B_i and G_i are unions of stutter classes
Add categorical coherence diagram verification: check that delta: T . Fair => Fair . T commutes
Prove preservation theorem: F-bisimulation quotient preserves CTL*\X under T-Fair coherence
Add proof_obligation tracking to witness certificates
key_improvements.success_metric: Formal theorem statement with constructive proof witness; all 5 benchmarks produce valid proof certificates

key_improvements.title: Principled Conformance Depth with Soundness Guarantees
key_improvements.addresses_critique: Bounded conformance testing with user-supplied depth parameter introduces a soundness gap
key_improvements.current_state: conformance_gap.py has W-method error bounds but no integration with the learner. Depth selection is manual. No incremental deepening protocol. No diameter computation.
planned_changes: Implement exact hypothesis diameter computation via BFS
Add automatic depth sufficiency computation: k >= diam(H) + (m - n + 1)
Implement incremental deepening: start at k=3, increase until k-sufficient or convergence detected
Add convergence certificate: when gap analyzer reports error_bound=0, emit a conformance completeness certificate
Integrate gap analysis into the pipeline with live convergence monitoring
Add specification-derived upper bounds on concrete state count m
key_improvements.success_metric: Automatic depth selection achieving conformance completeness on all benchmarks; convergence certificates emitted

key_improvements.title: Rigorous Evaluation with Bloom Filter Soundness Analysis
key_improvements.addresses_critique: Evaluation lacks rigor; Bloom filter false-positive impact on verification soundness not analyzed; no comparisons
key_improvements.current_state: evaluation/ has benchmark harness but no ablation framework, no baseline comparisons, no Bloom filter analysis. Bloom filter in Merkle tree is implicit; no formal FPR analysis.
planned_changes: Add Bloom filter false-positive rate analysis module with formal bounds
Implement ablation study framework: disable individual components and measure impact
Add partition-refinement baseline (Paige-Tarjan) as comparison target
Add scalability experiments with parameterized state space sizes
Implement comparison metrics: time, memory, compression ratio vs baseline
Add statistical significance testing (confidence intervals, effect sizes)
Add large-scale benchmarks: Raft consensus, dining philosophers (N=8,16,32)
key_improvements.success_metric: Ablation results showing component contributions; scalability curves to 100K+ states; formal Bloom FPR bounds

phases.B1: Execute all three improvements with real code and experiments
phases.B2: Math rigor pass: verify all theorem statements, add missing proofs, check consistency
phases.finalization: Rewrite .tex (30 pages), grounding.json, README.md, API.md, run experiments
